senses.gloss: the area between the shoulder joints and the neck; the shoulders and the upper back; the shoulder girdle; something resembling, likened to, or related to the shoulders or the back (such as endurance, energy, stamina, and so on)

the area between the shoulder joints and the neck; the shoulders and the upper back; the shoulder girdle; someone resembling, likened to, or related to the shoulders or the back (such as a friend, a backer, a sponser, a supporter, a provider, a chieftain, and so on)

etymology.text: From the root ك ه ل (k h l), from the root's now-obsolete senses "middle age; adulthood; reliability; backing and support".
